assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes notifications into specific types including auto-upgrade scheduled (72h notice), new version available (minor/patch), end-of-life warnings (30/7 days), and security patches (Critical CVE)

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response uses clear urgency hierarchy: URGENT (includes security patches/CVEs), HIGH PRIORITY, MEDIUM PRIORITY (includes new versions available), and INFORMATIONAL (lowest priority)

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly lists EoS warnings as URGENT priority and provides specific action playbooks with manual upgrade commands and maintenance exclusion options

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed pre-upgrade checklist including commands to check deprecated APIs, PDBs, and bare pods when auto-upgrade is scheduled

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response categorizes security advisories with critical CVEs as URGENT with 24-48 hour timeline and mentions planning emergency upgrades

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response places 'New Minor Version Available' in MEDIUM PRIORITY with 1-2 month timeline for planning, and 'Patch Version Available' as INFORMATIONAL with no immediate action needed

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands for setting up Pub/Sub notifications and provides Cloud Logging queries for monitoring auto-upgrade events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes - focuses on notification triage but lacks this reference
